creator: b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Joel Bodenmann from comment #2)

Thank you for committing my update and patch however, I have no plans to use git in the future... For what little I do it is total overkill, and I believe that requiring users/maintainers to submit patches of any kind to the use of one program or platform goes against everything that FreeBSD stands for...

Once it is decided that git is the only way to submit patches is the day I will give up the two ports I wish to spend my time to maintain...
